strengths: 6+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and React across multiple senior roles
Direct AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, Selenium course, Fluent-Asserts library, CI/CD)
concerns: No Nest.js mentioned anywhere in the résumé
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms, ~2016-2018)
Cloud experience listed only as AWS CDK at Optilyz; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth beyond GISCollective self-hosting
response.justification: Candidate clearly meets the 6+ years full-stack bar with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Docker evidenced at Optilyz, RIDE, and re:cinq. The required AI-agent competency is directly addressed by current MCP/agentic tooling work at re:cinq. Testing expertise is strong (TDD practice at RIDE, authored Fluent-Asserts and Trial test runner, taught Selenium courses). Gaps: Nest.js is not mentioned, Kotlin is absent, and Java work is dated; cloud breadth beyond AWS and Kubernetes depth are thin. Overall a strong fit with one framework gap that is learnable for a senior engineer.
